changes.title: Restart restore
changes.desc: Projects that were running before a panel restart are automatically started again when PyVegar boots.

changes.title: Update notification
changes.desc: Dashboard checks the latest GitHub commit and shows an update prompt when a newer commit is available.

changes.title: Editor and file save fixes
changes.desc: Improved file editor line numbers/status, faster plain-text saves for large files, and safe handling for files named new.

changes.title: Install Runtime
changes.desc: Settings → Install Runtime: one-click Node.js install via NVM (nvm install 24) with standalone binary fallback (node-v26.0.0-linux-x64); live colour-coded WebSocket install log

changes.title: Save Settings fix
changes.desc: Resolved JS crash that prevented the Settings save button from working when credential input fields were absent from the DOM

changes.title: Runtime detector update
changes.desc: Checks standalone binary → NVM → system PATH in priority order; badge shows NVM / Standalone / System source

changes.title: SPA navigation
changes.desc: Full single-page app router — no page reloads, animated progress bar, fade transitions between all pages

changes.title: Ghost-free WebSockets
changes.desc: PV3.onNavigate cleanup registry kills all WS connections and timers on navigate-away, preventing duplicate reconnect loops

changes.title: End-to-end security
changes.desc: bcrypt password hashing, login rate-limiting (5 attempts → 5-min lockout), SecurityHeaders middleware, hardened session cookie

changes.title: Security panel
changes.desc: Settings → Security: change password with strength bar, security status pills, lockout warning on login

changes.title: New logo
changes.desc: Solid-filled PV panel monogram, transparent variant, and SVG favicon on every page

changes.title: Floating taskbar
changes.desc: Curved pill navbar with backdrop blur and Imperial Red glow across all pages

changes.title: Imperial Red + Night theme
changes.desc: Pure #FB3640 accent and #080808 background throughout — zero colour mixing

changes.title: GitHub update check
changes.desc: Settings → About shows current commit hash with Check and Update Now buttons

changes.title: Mobile taskbar
changes.desc: Pill reverts to flat full-width bar on small screens for a clean mobile layout

changes.title: Restart All fix
changes.desc: Fixed async blocking issue and JS error that prevented Restart All from working

changes.title: Modern server logs
changes.desc: Colour-coded output with level badges, parsed HTTP lines, and WebSocket events

changes.title: Real-time status badge
changes.desc: WebSocket stats payload includes project id; status badge updates every 1s

changes.title: Live uptime tile
changes.desc: Server info card shows formatted uptime refreshed every second

changes.title: Auto-restart
changes.desc: Processes that crash are automatically restarted with configurable delay
